title: Spider Infection
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65bc905a31ff6c69440be04480e454bb84b4373e_0.webp)

**Mod Description**



"The webs are spreading... and nothing is safe."

Spider Infection is a creepy-crawly mod that brings a terrifying twist to Minecraft’s ecosystem. Once neutral creatures, spiders have become the apex predators, infected with a mysterious venom that compels them to attack any and every mob in sight.



Features:
Spiders now attack all mobs
Once a mob dies by a spider it turns into another spider
